content: {"file": "src/core/render3/styling/style_stamping.ts", "summary": "This file contains logic for managing and applying styles to components in Angular. It includes functions for updating, interpolating, and reconciling styling values with live collections of elements.", "rules": [{"name": "Update Styling Values", "description": "Updates the styling value of a component based on new input values or interpolated strings.", "conditions": ["Interpolation function called"], "actions": ["Check if new value is different from old, update if necessary"]}, {"name": "Reconcile Live Collections", "description": "Compares live collection items with new data and updates, moves, or destroys elements as needed to reflect the current state.", "conditions": ["Live collection length differs from new collection"], "actions": ["Iterate through collections, compare values using trackBy function, update or move elements"]}], "dependencies": ["ɵɵclassMapInterpolate1", "ɵɵcomponentInstance", "ɵɵclassMapInterpolateV", "reconcile"]}
